mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.tag_name as tagName, t.tag_name as tag, t.tag_type as tagType, t.category_id as categoryId, t.status, t.create_time as createTime, t.update_time as updateTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_tag at WHERE at.tag_id = t.id AND at.deleted = 0) as articleCount FROM tag t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.id ASC

SELECT id, tag_name as tagName, tag_name as tag, tag_type as tagType, category_id as categoryId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM tag WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tag (tag_name, tag_type, category_id, status, deleted) VALUES (#{tagName}, #{tagType}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE tag SET tag_name = #{tagName}, tag_type = #{tagType}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tag SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
